_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: Omio
listings.description: Omio is a multi-modal transport meta booking engine that lets travelers search and compare rail, bus, and flight options across Europe and beyond in a single interface, aggregating schedules and fares from hundreds of operators.
usps: Unified multi-modal meta search across Europe
Broad operator coverage in a single interface
Strong consumer brand recognition

listings.name: Rail Europe
listings.description: Rail Europe operates a rail-focused meta booking platform aggregating fares and passes from European national rail operators, primarily serving international travelers planning cross-border European rail trips from outside the region.
usps: Long-established brand for inbound rail travelers
Specialist in multi-country rail pass products
Broad European operator content

listings.name: Trainline
listings.description: Trainline operates a rail and coach meta search and booking app aggregating fares from national and regional operators primarily across the UK and Europe, with split-ticketing technology to find optimal fare combinations for travelers.
usps: Leading rail meta app in UK/Europe
Unique split-ticketing savings technology
Large combined rail and coach operator network

listings.name: 12Go
listings.description: 12Go is a Southeast Asia-focused meta search and booking platform aggregating train, bus, ferry, and flight schedules across the region, allowing travelers to compare multi-modal routes and book tickets in one transaction.
usps: Dominant multi-modal meta search in Southeast Asia
Broad ferry and rural transport coverage
Simplified booking for complex regional routes

listings.name: Wanderu
listings.description: Wanderu is a North American ground transport meta search engine that aggregates bus and train fares from multiple operators, letting travelers compare prices and schedules across providers before booking through a unified checkout.
usps: Leading bus/rail meta search in North America
White-label technology licensing model
Broad North American ground operator coverage

listings.name: Loco2
listings.description: Loco2 provides a rail-focused meta search tool for cross-border European train journeys, aggregating fares across multiple national operators for travelers seeking simplified international rail bookings, now integrated within Trainline's network.
usps: Early mover in cross-border rail meta search
Appeals to sustainability-focused travelers
Simplified multi-operator interface

listings.name: Virail
listings.description: Virail is a transport meta search engine comparing train, bus, and flight options across Europe and other regions, aggregating multiple operator fares to help travelers find the fastest or cheapest combination for their journey.
usps: Broad multi-modal comparison across Europe and beyond
Simple fastest/cheapest sorting tools
Wide affiliate partner network

listings.name: Rail Ninja
listings.description: Rail Ninja operates a meta booking tool aggregating international rail fares for tourists in Asia, Europe, and beyond, simplifying comparison and booking of train tickets across unfamiliar rail systems for non-local travelers.
usps: Tourist-friendly meta search for complex rail systems
Coverage across multiple continents
Simplified checkout for non-locals

listings.name: Distribusion
listings.description: Distribusion powers meta search and booking widgets for bus and rail content that are embedded into airline, OTA, and travel marketplace sites, aggregating ground transport schedules to make intercity rail bookable alongside flights.
usps: Broadest global ground transport meta aggregation
Strong airline & OTA embedded partnerships
Rapid international operator onboarding

listings.name: Raillio
listings.description: Raillio is an emerging European rail meta search platform aggregating fares across multiple national rail operators for cross-border journey comparison, aimed at helping travelers avoid booking directly through numerous individual operator websites.
usps: Focused purely on rail meta comparison
Simplifies fragmented European rail booking
Growing operator coverage across the continent

listings.name: TrainPal
listings.description: TrainPal operates a UK and international rail meta search app aggregating fares and offering split-ticketing comparison to find cheaper journey combinations, competing with Trainline in the consumer rail booking meta space.
usps: Competitive alternative to Trainline in the UK
Focus on fare-saving split-ticketing comparison
Growing international rail meta coverage

listings.name: Rail Planner (Eurail)
listings.description: Rail Planner, developed by Eurail/Interrail, is a trip planning and meta search app helping pass holders compare and plan train journeys across European operators, integrating timetables and reservation requirement information across the continent.
usps: Official companion tool for Eurail/Interrail pass holders
Deep integration with pan-European timetable data
Trusted by backpacker and rail pass travelers

listings.name: Trainu
listings.description: Trainu is a rail meta search and booking service aggregating European train fares for independent and group travelers, offering fare comparison across multiple operators along with optional guided rail tour packages.
usps: Combines meta search with curated rail tour packages
Flexible independent and group traveler options
Growing niche in guided rail tourism

listings.name: Trainline Europe
listings.description: Trainline Europe extends Trainline's meta search and booking capability across a broader set of continental European rail operators beyond its UK core, allowing travelers to compare and book cross-border journeys in multiple languages and currencies.
usps: Extends Trainline's meta search beyond the UK
Broad continental operator content
Unified account across markets

listings.name: Rail.cc
listings.description: Rail.cc is a European rail travel information and meta search site helping travelers plan and compare cross-border train journeys, aggregating route options and linking through to individual operator or partner booking sites for ticket purchase.
usps: Rich editorial content on night trains and routes
Niche focus on lesser-known cross-border connections
Trusted resource for independent rail travelers
